milestones.message: Your first challenge complete! Welcome to the workshop.
Day 1 core complete! You have the GitHub fundamentals.
Double digits! You are building real momentum.
Over halfway! VS Code and Git are in your toolkit.
Advanced territory! Copilot, reviews, and templates mastered.
ALL CHALLENGES COMPLETE! You are ready to contribute to any open source project.
